_fixture_notice: FIXTURE. Synthetic response shaped like openFDA /drug/label.json. The drug, the application number and every string are invented and describe no real product. Used only to exercise analysis/label_adapters.py::parse_openfda_label.

boxed_warning: FIXTURE BOXED WARNING: Fatal fixture hepatotoxicity has occurred in fixture subjects receiving FIXTURIMAB.

warnings_and_cautions: FIXTURE: Immune-mediated fixture pneumonitis has been reported.
